name: Lucid Dreaming
author: BLJ_BrokenGD
demonDifficulty: Oh the balancing on my old levels... So this was a terrible but kind of fun experience. So that wave spam between 72%-75% makes up like 76% of the levels difficulty so its annoying to runs on this level with that. The rest is either skill based or nerve control. The transition at 93% is so stupid like what was I on when making that XD. Honestly I don't care anymore I am just happy I don't have to play this unbalanced level anymore lol Demon
